lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there! You look like a hunter. What are you on the hunt for?

lines.speaker: Diana
lines.text: Nilsal! I'm actually out here writing reports on the animals of the forest.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Made any interesting observations so far?

lines.speaker: Diana
lines.text: Well, it would appear that a number of them are somewhat incorporeal...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'd actually made that observation myself. I imagine being incorporeal means they're somewhat harder to hunt?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about the ents? Anything interesting to note on them?

lines.speaker: Diana
lines.text: Yes, in between avoiding being stepped on by them, I've been trying to see how they interact with the other animals... specifically the corporeal ones.

lines.speaker: Diana
lines.text: Truth be told though, they don't really seem to be affected by them. They just keep on their merry way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting... Well, if you need any help with any of this stuff, do let me know. It wouldn't be the first time I've dealt with guild reports.

lines.speaker: Diana
lines.text: Oh, are you familiar with the guild?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've helped out a touch here and there.

lines.speaker: Diana
lines.text: Good, good. Well, thank you for the offer, but I think I'm good for the moment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting... Well, if you need any help with any of this stuff, do let me know.

lines.speaker: Diana
lines.text: Thank you for the offer, but I think I'm good for the moment.
